[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110101 6
1 10100100 3
2 10100011 4
3 10000011 3
4 10010011 4
5 11000011 4
6 11100011 5
7 10100011 4
